summary: Tested ceremony video endpoints, trailer download, and scheduler configuration. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/festivals/{festival_id}/ceremony-video correctly returns {available: false} when no video exists
POST /api/festivals/{festival_id}/generate-ceremony-video correctly returns 404 'Nessuna edizione attiva' when no live ceremony
GET /api/films/{film_id}/trailer/download returns 404 'Film non trovato' for non-existent films
Scheduler job 'cleanup_ceremony_videos' properly configured at line 7946 - runs daily at 04:00 UTC
Video section in LIVE ceremony modal only appears when ALL categories are announced (tested via frontend)
Trailer download button visible in film detail page when trailer is generated

success_rate.backend: 100% (10 passed, 1 skipped - test user has no films)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Live ceremony modal, trailer section, download button all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The ceremony video system requires ALL categories to be announced before video generation is available. Currently Golden Stars Awards has 1/10 categories announced (Best Film has a WINNER, 9 others still have 'Announce' buttons). The cleanup_ceremony_videos scheduler job is configured to run daily at 04:00 UTC and deletes videos older than 3 days. Trailer download button is visible in film detail pages for films with generated trailers.

features_tested.ceremony_video_endpoint_no_video: PASSED - Returns {available: false} when no ceremony video exists
features_tested.ceremony_video_generate_no_edition: PASSED - Returns 404 'Nessuna edizione attiva' when no active edition
features_tested.ceremony_video_download_no_video: PASSED - Returns 404 'Video non disponibile' when no video exists
features_tested.trailer_download_nonexistent_film: PASSED - Returns 404 'Film non trovato' for non-existent films
features_tested.festivals_list_endpoint: PASSED - Returns list of festivals including golden_stars
features_tested.festivals_golden_stars_exists: PASSED - golden_stars festival exists and is active
features_tested.live_ceremony_category_status: PASSED - Live ceremony shows 1 announced, 9 not announced
features_tested.frontend_live_modal: PASSED - Live ceremony modal opens with categories and nominees
features_tested.frontend_trailer_section: PASSED - Trailer section visible with generated trailer
features_tested.frontend_download_trailer_btn: PASSED - Download button visible for films with trailers

screenshots: .screenshots/01_festivals_page.png - Festivals overview showing Golden Stars Awards as ACTIVE + LIVE
.screenshots/02_live_ceremony_modal.png - Live ceremony modal with WINNER in Best Film, Announce buttons for other categories
.screenshots/03_live_ceremony_scrolled.png - Scrolled ceremony view showing more categories
.screenshots/10_film_detail_scrolled.png - Film detail with TRAILER VIDEO section and Download button visible

code_review_findings.server.py_lines_10806-10953: Ceremony video endpoints implemented correctly - generate, get info, and download
code_review_findings.server.py_lines_10955-10978: Trailer download endpoint handles local files and URL redirects properly
code_review_findings.server.py_lines_7935-7948: Scheduler job for video cleanup configured with CronTrigger at 04:00 UTC
code_review_findings.video_generator.py: Video generation using FFmpeg with TTS audio, subtitles, and background image
code_review_findings.App.js_ceremony_video: Frontend correctly checks ceremonyVideo.available and shows section only when all categories announced
